modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty using Sparkline Tools in Excel.

full_description_text: The user is trying to figure out how to use Sparkline Tools in Excel. They are having trouble understanding how to access and utilize this feature. This has caused some frustration during their work.
